Inside the Course

What You'll Learn & Build

Five core skills that take you from zero to professional output — fast.

01

Generate Flyer Concepts

Use AI to instantly produce professional flyer ideas, layouts, and visual direction that would take hours to brainstorm manually.

02

Structure Premium Layouts

Learn the design principles that make a flyer look expensive. Typography, spacing, hierarchy — done right.

03

Use Proven AI Prompts

Copy-and-use prompts that reliably produce stunning results. No guesswork. No trial and error.

04

Edit & Refine Designs

Know how to take an AI output and polish it into a client-ready deliverable that commands premium pricing.

05

Sell to Real Clients

Position yourself, price your work, and get paid. The business side that most design courses skip entirely.
